doris:position-deletes:v2.notes: Doris 4.x reads V2 tables with Position Delete files via its Iceberg catalog; position deletes are applied at scan time

doris:position-deletes:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 reads V3 tables; V3 uses Puffin Deletion Vectors as the primary row-level delete mechanism, and Doris can still read legacy position deletes if present
caveats: V3 tables primarily use Deletion Vectors rather than position delete files

doris:equality-deletes:v2.notes: Doris 4.x reads equality delete files on V2 tables via its Iceberg catalog connector

doris:equality-deletes:v3.notes: Iceberg V3 uses Puffin Deletion Vectors instead of equality deletes; Doris follows the V3 spec by not emitting or relying on equality deletes for V3 tables
caveats: V3 replaces equality-delete semantics with Deletion Vectors

doris:merge-on-read:v2.notes: Doris 4.x supports merge-on-read for V2 tables using Position Delete files; DML writes (UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE INTO) emit position deletes

doris:merge-on-read:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports merge-on-read for V3 tables using Puffin-format Deletion Vectors; V3 DML writes Deletion Vectors rather than position delete files

doris:copy-on-write:v2.notes: Doris DML uses merge-on-read (Position Deletes on V2); copy-on-write is not implemented
caveats: Doris writes Position Delete files, not rewritten data files, for UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE INTO

doris:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Doris DML uses merge-on-read (Deletion Vectors on V3); copy-on-write is not implemented
caveats: Doris writes Puffin Deletion Vectors, not rewritten data files, for V3 UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE INTO

doris:schema-evolution:v2.notes: Doris supports ALTER TABLE schema changes (add/drop/rename/reorder columns) on Iceberg tables; schema evolution was added in Doris 3.1.0

doris:schema-evolution:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports ALTER TABLE schema changes on V3 Iceberg tables

doris:type-promotion:v2.notes: Doris supports safe type promotions such as INT → BIGINT and FLOAT → DOUBLE on Iceberg tables, added in Doris 4.0.4

doris:type-promotion:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports safe type promotions on V3 Iceberg tables

doris:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:column-default-values:v3.notes: Doris supports default values in ADD COLUMN DDL on V3 Iceberg tables
caveats: V3-specific default-value read semantics are not explicitly documented in Doris 4.x

doris:table-creation:v2.notes: Doris supports CREATE TABLE and CREATE TABLE AS SELECT (CTAS) against its Iceberg catalog

doris:table-creation:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 can create V3 Iceberg tables via CREATE TABLE with the 'format-version' = '3' table property

doris:time-travel:v2.notes: Doris supports time travel via FOR TIME AS OF and FOR VERSION AS OF SQL syntax on Iceberg tables

doris:time-travel:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports FOR TIME AS OF and FOR VERSION AS OF on V3 Iceberg tables

doris:table-maintenance:v2.notes: Doris supports ALTER TABLE ... EXECUTE maintenance actions including rewrite_data_files, expire_snapshots, rewrite_manifests, rollback_to_snapshot, and fast_forward

doris:table-maintenance:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports table maintenance actions on V3 Iceberg tables via ALTER TABLE ... EXECUTE

doris:branching-tagging:v2.notes: Doris supports Branch and Tag management via ALTER TABLE ... CREATE BRANCH/TAG, added in Doris 3.1.0

doris:branching-tagging:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports branch and tag management on V3 Iceberg tables

doris:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: Doris supports Iceberg partition transforms: year, month, day, hour, bucket, truncate, and identity

doris:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports the full set of Iceberg partition transforms on V3 tables: year, month, day, hour, bucket, truncate, and identity

doris:partition-evolution:v2.notes: Doris supports ADD/DROP/REPLACE PARTITION KEY operations, added in Doris 4.0.2

doris:partition-evolution:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports partition evolution on V3 Iceberg tables

doris:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: Multi-argument transform support on V3 tables is not documented in Doris 4.x
caveats: V3-only feature; Doris support not yet documented

doris:read-support:v2.notes: Doris 4.x provides full read support for Iceberg V1 and V2 tables via the Iceberg catalog

doris:read-support:v3.notes: Doris 4.1.0 adds full V3 read support including Puffin Deletion Vectors and Row Lineage hidden columns

doris:write-insert:v2.notes: Doris supports INSERT INTO, INSERT OVERWRITE, and CREATE TABLE AS SELECT (CTAS) against V2 Iceberg tables

doris:write-insert:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports INSERT INTO, INSERT OVERWRITE, and CTAS against V3 Iceberg tables

doris:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: Doris 4.1.0 adds UPDATE, DELETE, and MERGE INTO against V2 Iceberg tables, writing Position Delete files
caveats: UPDATE, DELETE, and MERGE INTO are experimental in Doris 4.1.0

doris:write-merge-update-delete:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 UPDATE, DELETE, and MERGE INTO on V3 Iceberg tables write Puffin Deletion Vectors
caveats: UPDATE, DELETE, and MERGE INTO on V3 are experimental in Doris 4.1.0

doris:catalog-integration:v2.notes: Doris supports the Iceberg catalog types hms, rest, hadoop, glue, dlf, jdbc, and s3tables

doris:catalog-integration:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports the same catalog types (hms, rest, hadoop, glue, dlf, jdbc, s3tables) for V3 Iceberg tables

doris:statistics:v2.notes: Doris uses Iceberg manifest column metrics (min/max, null counts) for query planning and predicate pushdown

doris:statistics:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 uses manifest column metrics for V3 Iceberg query planning and predicate pushdown

doris:bloom-filters:v2.notes: Puffin bloom-filter sidecars are not documented for Doris's Iceberg connector
caveats: Puffin bloom-filter sidecar support for Iceberg is not documented in Doris 4.x

doris:bloom-filters:v3.notes: Puffin bloom-filter sidecars are not documented for Doris's Iceberg connector on V3 tables
caveats: Puffin bloom-filter sidecar support for Iceberg is not documented in Doris 4.x

doris:hive-metastore:v2.notes: Doris supports the Iceberg hms catalog type for Hive Metastore integration

doris:hive-metastore:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports Hive Metastore for V3 Iceberg tables via the hms catalog type

doris:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: Doris supports AWS Glue as an Iceberg catalog via the glue catalog type
caveats: AWS Glue integration is read-only; DDL and data write-back are not supported

doris:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports AWS Glue for V3 Iceberg tables via the glue catalog type
caveats: AWS Glue integration is read-only; DDL and data write-back are not supported

doris:rest-catalog:v2.notes: Doris supports the Iceberg REST Catalog via the rest catalog type

doris:rest-catalog:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports the Iceberg REST Catalog for V3 tables

doris:nessie:v2.notes: Doris has no documented Nessie catalog integration
caveats: Nessie catalog support not documented in Doris 4.x

doris:nessie:v3.notes: Doris has no documented Nessie catalog integration for V3 tables
caveats: Nessie catalog support not documented in Doris 4.x

doris:polaris:v2.notes: Doris can access Polaris through the generic REST Catalog configuration; there is no dedicated Polaris integration
caveats: No dedicated Polaris connector; access is via the generic Iceberg REST Catalog

doris:polaris:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 can access Polaris for V3 Iceberg tables through the generic REST Catalog configuration
caveats: No dedicated Polaris connector; access is via the generic Iceberg REST Catalog

doris:unity-catalog:v2.notes: Doris can access Unity Catalog through the generic REST Catalog configuration; there is no dedicated Unity Catalog integration
caveats: No dedicated Unity Catalog connector; access is via the generic Iceberg REST Catalog

doris:unity-catalog:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 can access Unity Catalog for V3 Iceberg tables through the generic REST Catalog configuration
caveats: No dedicated Unity Catalog connector; access is via the generic Iceberg REST Catalog

doris:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: Doris can access Snowflake Horizon Catalog through the generic REST Catalog configuration
caveats: No dedicated Horizon connector; access is via the generic Iceberg REST Catalog

doris:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 can access Snowflake Horizon Catalog for V3 Iceberg tables through the generic REST Catalog configuration
caveats: No dedicated Horizon connector; access is via the generic Iceberg REST Catalog

doris:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: Doris supports the Hadoop (FileSystem) catalog via the hadoop catalog type

doris:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports the Hadoop (FileSystem) catalog for V3 Iceberg tables

doris:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: Doris supports a JDBC Iceberg catalog via the jdbc catalog type, introduced in Doris 4.1.0
caveats: JDBC catalog is experimental and was introduced in Doris 4.1.0

doris:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 supports a JDBC Iceberg catalog for V3 tables via the jdbc catalog type
caveats: JDBC catalog is experimental and was introduced in Doris 4.1.0

doris:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant type is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:variant-type:v3.notes: Iceberg Variant type support is not documented in Doris 4.x
caveats: V3-only feature; Doris support not documented

doris:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded Variant is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:shredded-variant:v3.notes: Shredded Variant support is not documented in Doris 4.x
caveats: V3-only feature; Doris support not documented

doris:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry type is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:geometry-type:v3.notes: Iceberg Geometry type support is not documented in Doris 4.x
caveats: V3-only feature; Doris support not documented

doris:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: Doris's Iceberg datetime precision is microsecond (precision 6), per the Doris 4.x Iceberg column-type mapping table; nanosecond precision is not supported
caveats: Doris Iceberg datetime precision is microsecond only (precision 6)

doris:lineage:v2.notes: Row Lineage is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

doris:lineage:v3.notes: Doris 4.1.0 exposes experimental Row Lineage hidden columns _row_id and _last_updated_sequence_number on V3 Iceberg tables
caveats: Row Lineage is experimental in Doris 4.1

doris:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

doris:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Doris 4.1 reads V3 tables that use Puffin deletion vectors as the primary row-level delete mechanism.
